description: A reference master mapping each material type to the set of required certifications that a supplier must hold (valid, non-expired) before the SupplierQualification for that material type can reach QUALIFIED or PRE_QUALIFIED. Three rows are pre-defined: food-agro (FSMS, HACCP, ISO22000), packing-material (food-grade declaration, migration-free ink certification, child-resistant packaging certification, BSE-TSE declaration), and api-raw (GMP, FDA registration, USP-BP-EP-IP compliance, COA x3 batches, ICH guidelines compliance, retention samples). The matrix is versioned so changes to requirements are tracked; the matrixVersion is stamped on every SupplierQualification record. Maintainable by the Administrator.

fields.name: id
fields.label: Matrix Row ID
fields.purpose: Stable surrogate key for the matrix row; referenced when stamping matrixVersion on a SupplierQualification record.

fields.name: materialType
fields.label: Material Type
fields.validation: one of the enum; unique per version; the key the SupplierQualification looks up to retrieve the required cert set
fields.purpose: The material category this row defines requirements for; maps one-to-one with the SupplierQualification.materialType field so the correct requirement set is always retrieved.

fields.name: requiredCertSet
fields.label: Required Certification Set
fields.validation: array of certification descriptor objects; each: {certCode (string), certName (string), mandatory (boolean), notes (string)}; the full required set for this material type. Pre-defined content: food-agro -> [{certCode: FSMS, mandatory: true}, {certCode: HACCP, mandatory: true}, {certCode: ISO22000, mandatory: true}]; packing-material -> [{certCode: FoodGradeDecl, mandatory: true}, {certCode: MigrationFreeInk, mandatory: true}, {certCode: ChildResistPkg, mandatory: false}, {certCode: BSE-TSE-Decl, mandatory: true}]; api-raw -> [{certCode: GMP, mandatory: true}, {certCode: FDAReg, mandatory: true}, {certCode: USP-BP-EP-IP, mandatory: true}, {certCode: COA-3Batch, mandatory: true}, {certCode: ICH-Compliance, mandatory: true}, {certCode: RetentionSamples, mandatory: true}]
fields.purpose: The authoritative list of certifications a supplier must hold for the given material type; used by SupplierQualification to populate its requiredCerts checklist and by Quality during the qualification review to confirm all certs are present and valid.

fields.name: version
fields.label: Matrix Version
fields.validation: non-blank; e.g. v1.0; incremented when requirements change; only one ACTIVE version per materialType
fields.purpose: Identifies the version of the requirements in force; stamped on every SupplierQualification record so auditors can determine which requirements applied at the time of qualification.

fields.name: effectiveFrom
fields.label: Effective From
fields.validation: <= today; the date this version of the requirements came into force
fields.purpose: The date from which this matrix version applies; qualifications completed before this date were assessed against the prior version; enables point-in-time compliance auditing.

invariants: A18 this matrix defines the required certification set per material type; SupplierQualification reads from the current version when assessing a supplier
A13 changes to the matrix are audited; prior versions are retained for historical traceability
only one ACTIVE version per materialType; prior versions are retained (soft history)
